Romania Summer of Selecția Națională
☀ Three editions · one summer · democracy

Summer of Selecția

Romania enters its national-final era for three consecutive WorldVision editions. The playlist has become too powerful, the late-2000s bangers are demanding justice, and the only reasonable answer is democracy.

Romania at WorldVision

This companion page is built as the central hub for Romania’s summer run: an overview page for the delegation, plus separate tabs for WV215, WV216, and WV217. The first edition is fully loaded as Popcorn Edition 215, with the entry lineup, YouTube links, and a direct forum PM voting link.

3summer editions
8Popcorn finalists
PMforum voting
5Romanian wins

Romania’s winner archive has been added: five WorldVision victories from the database, from Elena ft. Glance’s classic WV40 win to Alexandra Stan’s WV211 triumph. Three of them came in the current Gera11 era.

Romania’s WorldVision Winners

    Popcorn Edition 215

    Late 2000s / early 2010s Romanian dance-pop renaissance.

    WV216

    Second summer selection. Theme and entries coming soon.

    WV217

    Third consecutive national final. Democracy continues.

    WV215 · Romania · first summer national final

    Popcorn Edition 215

    Eight entries have been selected from a vast collection of late-2000s and early-2010s hits. The popcorn genre renaissance is happening as we speak: glossy club beats, beach energy, chaotic hooks, and enough nostalgia to power an entire seaside resort.

    Voting is handled directly through ESCUnited forum private messages. Voters should send their top four using the 12, 8, 4, and 2 points system via the official PM link below.

    Competing Entries

    Click “Watch on YouTube” on any entry to open the video directly on YouTube. This avoids embed playback errors in local HTML files.

    How to Vote

    Voting for Popcorn Edition 215 takes place by ESCUnited forum private message. Send your top four songs using the official points format:

    12favorite
    82nd place
    63rd place
    44th place

    All other entries receive zero points. The entry with the highest total wins Romania’s Selecția Națională: Popcorn Edition.

    Send Vote by Forum PM Review Entries

    Tie-break order: most 12s, then most 8s, then most voters who awarded the song points. If still tied, the Head of Delegation decides.

    Second summer national final

    WV216 Coming Soon

    Theme, entries, videos, and a forum PM voting link are ready to be added once the second Selecția Națională edition is revealed.

    Third summer national final

    WV217 Coming Soon

    The summer trilogy finale will get its own entry page, embedded videos, and forum PM voting link when the lineup is known.

    Summer of Selecția Națională · WorldVision Romania · Vote by forum PM · Ah, I love democracy.
